title: Install and maintain permaculture water management systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Install and maintain permaculture water management systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan the installation of water management system

pcs.text: Identify site and water management components from permaculture water management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site and water management components from permaculture water management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site and water management components from permaculture water management plan.

pcs.text: Estimate water demand for permaculture system and verify against water management plan specifications

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check source of water to ensure compatibility with system design and specifications.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify compliance with legislative and regulatory requirements specified in water management plan.

pcs.text: Report or rectify discrepancies in water system design according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report or rectify discrepancies in water system design according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report or rectify discrepancies in water system design according to workplace procedures.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures.

what_to_look_for: Accurate technical knowledge of clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and machinery
minimum_expected_knowledge: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and machinery.
indicators_of_partial_understanding: Knows the general concept but cannot specify technical detail
indicators_of_strong_understanding: Demonstrates precise, contextual, technically accurate knowledge with workplace application
